title: Loafy
description: Turn your hunger bars into bread!
body:
In this pack, you will be able to have your hunger bars as bread! Though this seems niche, the idea is to expand and make a fully custom resource pack!

DISCLAIMER:
The shaders used are not mine, and do not come pre-installed. If you want these shaders, download Iris Shader Mod and Complementary Unbound.
